creator: hsu@wlansystems.com
text:
Would it just be enough to add the chipset ID's so that they would be 
 identified or is there chipset version specific stuff which would also 
 need to be carried over ?
 
 Best regards,
 Heikki Suonsivu
 
 Stefan Sperling wrote:
 > I've looked at merging ral from HEAD into RELENG_6.
 > 
 > It is a bit complicated since the newer version of the ral driver
 > depends on various changes in the net80211 subsystem and bpf.
 > 
 > Especially the bpf changes are a problem, since they seem to
 > affect a lot of other device drivers as well. I stopped my merging
 > efforts there.
 > 
 > I guess running -CURRENT is the best solution if you really need
 > ral support now. I will probably wait for 7.0-RELEASE, and until
 > then use my ral card in an OpenBSD box, where it works just fine.
